Phase-24.NAME: Compact Mobile Admin Console
Phase-24.goal: Redesign the admin panel into a compact mobile-capable operator console for service status, users, devices, payments, and emergency actions.

scope.included: Admin overview, user search, device controls, payment status, system health, responsive navigation, and confirmation flows.
scope.excluded: Deploy/install script changes, backend business rule changes, billing provider changes, and user frontend redesign.

Phase-24.step-1: Inventory admin screens and identify desktop-only tables, oversized dashboards, duplicated controls, and low-value clutter.
Phase-24.step-2: Design mobile operator overview: service health, active users, subscriptions, revenue, RU/DE/VPN status, and latest alerts.
Phase-24.step-3: Design mobile user search and detail flow with subscription, payment, device, and audit summary.
Phase-24.step-4: Design mobile device action flow with block, unblock, rotate, revoke, confirmation, and audit visibility.
Phase-24.step-5: Apply compact admin UI rules: dense lists, tabs/segmented controls, fixed action bars, and no nested card layouts.
Phase-24.step-6: Verify build and mobile smoke paths for overview, user search, device actions, payments, and system health.

verification.check-2: Mobile viewport supports emergency device actions without desktop-only layout.
verification.check-3: Critical actions require confirmation and preserve audit visibility.
verification.check-4: No deploy/install scripts are modified by this phase.
